meta.title: Qwen Multi-Angle Image Generator | AI Camera Angle Control | OpenCreator
meta.description: Generate the same scene from new camera angles with Qwen Image Edit. Control horizontal rotation (0-360°), vertical tilt (-30° to 90°), and zoom for AI multi-view synthesis.

hero.description: Qwen Image Edit Multiple Angles uses a fine-tuned Qwen architecture with LoRA to generate new perspectives of any image. Control horizontal rotation, vertical tilt, and zoom to produce consistent multi-view outputs from a single input photo.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Precise camera angle manipulation powered by Qwen multi-view synthesis

horizontal.title: 360° Horizontal Rotation
horizontal.description: Rotate the virtual camera freely around the subject from 0° to 360°. Generate front, side, back, and any azimuth angle from a single input.

vertical.title: Vertical Tilt Control
vertical.description: Adjust elevation from -30° (slight low angle) to 90° (directly overhead). Perfect for top-down flat-lays or dramatic perspective shots.

zoom.title: 10-Level Zoom Control
zoom.description: Fine-tune focal distance with 10 zoom levels, producing outputs from wide establishing shots to tight close-ups without cropping.

consistency.title: Subject Consistency
consistency.description: Maintains visual identity, lighting, and detail coherence across different generated viewpoints of the same subject.

preview3d.title: Interactive 3D Preview
preview3d.description: Built-in 3D wireframe globe preview lets you drag to orbit and scroll to zoom, seeing your camera position in real-time before generating.

workflow.title: Canvas Workflow Integration
workflow.description: Works as a native atom in OpenCreator's node-based canvas. Chain with background swap, upscale, video generation, and more.

gallery.title: See It In Action
gallery.subtitle: Multi-angle outputs generated from single input images

multiGrid.title: Multi-Angle Grid
multiGrid.useCase: Generate a complete multi-angle set showing your subject from every perspective in a single workflow run.

topDown.title: Top-Down View
topDown.useCase: Perfect for flat-lay product photography, architectural plans, and catalogue shots that require a bird's-eye perspective.

leftRight.title: Horizontal Sweep
leftRight.useCase: Show products from multiple side angles for e-commerce listings and 360° product galleries.

lowAngle.title: Low-Angle Close-Up
lowAngle.useCase: Create dramatic, editorial-style close-ups with slight upward tilt for fashion and luxury product photography.

comparison.title: Model Comparison
comparison.subtitle: How Qwen Multi-Angle compares to other image editing approaches

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, credit-based pricing
pricing.description: Each multi-angle generation costs credits based on resolution. Subscribe to get more credits per month.
pricing.note: 36 credits per generation. Subscribe to save more.

0.question: What is Qwen Multi-Angle and how does it work?
0.answer: Qwen Multi-Angle uses a fine-tuned Qwen architecture with LoRA trained specifically for novel view synthesis. Given a single input image, it generates the same scene from a new camera angle defined by horizontal rotation (0-360°), vertical tilt (-30° to 90°), and zoom level (0-10).

1.question: What types of images work best?
1.answer: Clear, well-lit photos of single subjects work best — products on white or simple backgrounds, portraits with clean lighting, or objects with distinct shapes. Avoid extremely cluttered backgrounds or images where the subject is heavily occluded.

2.question: Can I generate a full 360° product view?
2.answer: Yes. Chain multiple Angle Control nodes with different horizontal angles (e.g. 0°, 45°, 90°, 135°, 180°, 225°, 270°, 315°) in an OpenCreator workflow to produce a complete rotation set from a single input photo.

3.question: How accurate is the generated viewpoint?
3.answer: For most subjects, the angle accuracy is within a few degrees of the target. Complex subjects with many occluded details (like the back of a person only shown from the front) will involve some creative interpretation by the model.

4.question: How does this compare to 3D rendering?
4.answer: Unlike 3D rendering which requires 3D models, textures, and a rendering pipeline, Qwen Multi-Angle works directly from 2D photos. It's faster and requires no 3D expertise, though it may not match the precision of true 3D renders for complex mechanical objects.

5.question: Can I combine it with other OpenCreator features?
5.answer: Yes. The Angle Control atom works within OpenCreator's node-based canvas. Connect it with Background Swap, Image Upscale, Image-to-Video, Virtual Try-On, or any other atom to build comprehensive creative workflows.
